title: client.rs: debug_assert in get_block_range should be assert
description: wallet/src/client.rs line 180: get_block_range uses debug_assert!(start <= end) to guard the precondition that start must be <= end. debug_assert is compiled out in release builds, so a caller passing start > end in a release build silently proceeds to issue a malformed RPC request and gets a confusing gRPC error instead of a clear precondition failure. The guard should be assert! so it fires in both debug and release. Additionally, if tests are ever run with --release profile, the debug_assert will not fire even in test code, defeating its purpose as a test-time guard. Fix: change debug_assert! to assert!.
